<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Barn Boys World Cup Draw</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{--navy:#020B18;--navy2:#071428;--pitch:#1A7A3A;--gold:#F2C94C;--gold2:#E0A800;--white:#F5F0E8;--muted:#5A7A9A}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}
.bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 130% 55% at 50% 110%,rgba(26,122,58,.28) 0%,transparent 55%),linear-gradient(175deg,#020B18 0%,#071428 55%,#081510 100%)}
.bg::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 28% 18% at 8% 3%,rgba(242,201,76,.06) 0%,transparent 70%),radial-gradient(ellipse 28% 18% at 92% 3%,rgba(242,201,76,.06) 0%,transparent 70%);animation:flicker 8s ease-in-out infinite alternate}
@keyframes flicker{0%{opacity:.7}50%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:.8}}
.particle{position:fixed;pointer-events:none;border-radius:50%;animation:float linear infinite}
@keyframes float{0%{transform:translateY(100vh) rotate(0deg);opacity:0}10%{opacity:1}90%{opacity:.5}100%{transform:translateY(-10vh) rotate(720deg);opacity:0}}
.wrap{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px 60px}
header{text-align:center;padding:36px 0 28px;position:relative}
.eyebrow{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.35em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;opacity:.85}
header h1{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.6rem,7vw,5rem);line-height:.92;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.02em;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fff 30%,var(--gold) 60%,#fff 90%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(242,201,76,.25))}
header h1 span{-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--gold)}
.header-sub{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:12px}
.gold-line{width:80px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:16px auto}
.dancer-wrap{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(242,201,76,.4));animation:bounce 1.8s ease-in-out infinite}
.dancer-wrap img{width:80px;border-radius:6px}
@keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
.pot-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(242,201,76,.12),rgba(242,201,76,.06));border:1px solid rgba(242,201,76,.3);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 24px;margin:0 auto 28px;max-width:500px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(242,201,76,.08)}
.pot-label{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.25em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}
.pot-amount{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:2.4rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),#fff,var(--gold2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.pot-sub{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.1em}
.tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:28px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-radius:10px;padding:4px;max-width:420px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
.tab{flex:1;padding:9px 0;font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:7px;transition:all .25s}
.tab.active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(242,201,76,.2),rgba(242,201,76,.08));color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(242,201,76,.1)}
.tab:hover:not(.active){color:var(--white)}
.section{display:none}.section.active{display:block}
.wheel-area{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:20px}
.canvas-wrap{position:relative;display:inline-block}
canvas{display:block;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(26,122,58,.35)) drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(242,201,76,.15))}
.pointer-tri{position:absolute;top:-2px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:0;height:0;border-left:12px solid transparent;border-right:12px solid transparent;border-top:24px solid var(--gold);filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 6px rgba(242,201,76,.6));z-index:10}
.spin-btn{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:.1em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2));color:#000;border:none;padding:14px 50px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(242,201,76,.35);transition:all .2s;text-transform:uppercase}
.spin-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(242,201,76,.5)}
.spin-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none}
.result-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 24px;min-width:320px;text-align:center;min-height:80px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.result-name{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--gold)}
.result-team{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase}
.result-waiting{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase}
.reset-btn{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:var(--muted);font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:7px 20px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.reset-btn:hover{border-color:rgba(224,56,56,.4);color:#e74c3c}
.picks-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:12px}
.pick-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;transition:border-color .2s}
.pick-card:hover{border-color:rgba(242,201,76,.2)}
.pick-num{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--muted);min-width:28px}
.pick-name{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white)}
.pick-teams{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:5px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.team-tag{font-size:.7rem;font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.05em;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:4px}
.team-top{background:rgba(242,201,76,.15);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(242,201,76,.25)}
.team-bot{background:rgba(26,122,58,.2);color:#4dba6e;border:1px solid rgba(26,122,58,.3)}
.tracker-header{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:12px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px}
.tracker-info{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase}
.bonus-badge{background:rgba(26,122,58,.2);border:1px solid rgba(26,122,58,.4);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 12px;font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;color:#4dba6e;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase}
.tracker-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:10px}
.tracker-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px}
.tc-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px}
.tc-name{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:.95rem}
.tc-earned-amt{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold);text-align:right}
.tc-earned-lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;text-align:right}
.tc-teams{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;line-height:1.5}
.tc-wins{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.wins-lbl{font-size:.7rem;font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;flex:1}
.wins-ctrl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.win-btn{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);background:transparent;color:var(--white);font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.win-btn:hover{background:rgba(242,201,76,.15);border-color:rgba(242,201,76,.3);color:var(--gold)}
.wins-count{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;min-width:20px;text-align:center}
.rules-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:12px;padding:28px 32px;max-width:650px;margin:0 auto}
.rules-card h3{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:18px;letter-spacing:.05em}
.rule{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px;align-items:flex-start}
.rule-num{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold);min-width:24px}
.rule-text{font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;font-size:.95rem;color:rgba(245,240,232,.8);line-height:1.5}
.rule-text strong{color:var(--white)}
#toast{position:fixed;bottom:30px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);background:rgba(242,201,76,.15);border:1px solid rgba(242,201,76,.3);color:var(--gold);font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:.1em;padding:10px 22px;border-radius:8px;opacity:0;transition:all .35s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;z-index:999}
#toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
.section-title{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.25em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:20px}
.empty-state{text-align:center;padding:50px 20px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase}
.spin-label{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:-8px}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="bg"></div>
<div id="particles"></div>
<div class="wrap">
  <header>
    <div class="dancer-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/gif;base64," alt="Let him cook">
    </div>
    <div class="eyebrow">USA &middot; Canada &middot; Mexico &middot; 2026</div>
    <h1>BARN BOYS<br><span>WORLD CUP</span> DRAW</h1>
    <div class="gold-line"></div>
    <div class="header-sub">48 Teams &middot; 24 Players &middot; Winner Takes All</div>
  </header>
  <div class="pot-banner">
    <div class="pot-label">Total Pot</div>
    <div class="pot-amount" id="potDisplay">$1,200</div>
    <div class="pot-sub">24 players &times; $50 buy-in</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tabs">
    <button class="tab active" onclick="switchTab('wheel')">Draw</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="switchTab('results')">Results</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="switchTab('tracker')">Tracker</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="switchTab('rules')">Rules</button>
  </div>
  <div class="section active" id="section-wheel">
    <div class="wheel-area">
      <div class="canvas-wrap">
        <div class="pointer-tri"></div>
        <canvas id="wheel" width="480" height="480"></canvas>
      </div>
      <div class="spin-label" id="spinLabel">Spinning for Top 24 team</div>
      <div class="result-box" id="resultBox">
        <div class="result-waiting">Spin to assign a team</div>
      </div>
      <button class="spin-btn" id="spinBtn" onclick="spin()">SPIN</button>
      <button class="reset-btn" onclick="confirmReset()">Reset Draft</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="section" id="section-results">
    <div class="section-title">Draft Results</div>
    <div id="picksGrid" class="picks-grid"></div>
    <div id="picksEmpty" class="empty-state">No picks yet &mdash; spin the wheel</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section" id="section-tracker">
    <div class="tracker-header">
      <div class="tracker-info">Underdog Knockout Wins</div>
      <div class="bonus-badge">+$20 per win</div>
    </div>
    <div id="trackerGrid" class="tracker-grid"></div>
    <div id="trackerEmpty" class="empty-state">No picks yet &mdash; spin the wheel</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section" id="section-rules">
    <div class="rules-card">
      <h3>HOW IT WORKS</h3>
      <div class="rule"><div class="rule-num">1</div><div class="rule-text"><strong>$50 buy-in</strong> per person &mdash; 24 players, <strong>$1,200 total pot</strong>.</div></div>
      <div class="rule"><div class="rule-num">2</div><div class="rule-text">Each player gets <strong>two teams</strong>: one from the <strong>Top 24</strong> (favorites) and one from the <strong>Bottom 24</strong> (underdogs).</div></div>
      <div class="rule"><div class="rule-num">3</div><div class="rule-text">The player whose team wins the <strong>World Cup final</strong> takes the pot &mdash; minus any underdog bonuses paid out.</div></div>
      <div class="rule"><div class="rule-num">4</div><div class="rule-text"><strong>Underdog bonus:</strong> every time a Bottom 24 team wins a <strong>knockout stage match</strong>, the owner earns <strong>$20</strong> taken from the main pot.</div></div>
      <div class="rule"><div class="rule-num">5</div><div class="rule-text">If both your teams are eliminated, you still collect any underdog bonuses you earned along the way.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="toast"></div>
<script>
const TEAMS_DATA = {"top": [{"name": "Brazil", "stripes": ["#009C3B", "#FEDD00", "#002776"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "France", "stripes": ["#002395", "#FFFFFF", "#ED2939"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "England", "stripes": ["#FFFFFF", "#CF142B", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "cross", "cross": "#CF142B"}, {"name": "Argentina", "stripes": ["#74ACDF", "#FFFFFF", "#74ACDF"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Spain", "stripes": ["#AA151B", "#F1BF00", "#AA151B"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Portugal", "stripes": ["#006600", "#FF0000"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Germany", "stripes": ["#000000", "#DD0000", "#FFCE00"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Netherlands", "stripes": ["#AE1C28", "#FFFFFF", "#21468B"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Belgium", "stripes": ["#000000", "#FFD90C", "#F31830"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Croatia", "stripes": ["#FF0000", "#FFFFFF", "#0000CD"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Uruguay", "stripes": ["#FFFFFF", "#0038A8"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "USA", "stripes": ["#B22234", "#FFFFFF", "#B22234", "#FFFFFF", "#3C3B6E"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Mexico", "stripes": ["#006847", "#FFFFFF", "#CE1126"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Colombia", "stripes": ["#FCD116", "#003087", "#CE1126"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Morocco", "stripes": ["#C1272D", "#006233"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Japan", "stripes": ["#FFFFFF", "#BC002D", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Senegal", "stripes": ["#00853F", "#FDEF42", "#E31B23"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Switzerland", "stripes": ["#FF0000", "#FFFFFF", "#FF0000"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Denmark", "stripes": ["#C60C30", "#FFFFFF", "#C60C30"], "dir": "cross", "cross": "#FFFFFF"}, {"name": "Austria", "stripes": ["#ED2939", "#FFFFFF", "#ED2939"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "South Korea", "stripes": ["#FFFFFF", "#CD2E3A", "#003478", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Australia", "stripes": ["#00008B", "#FF0000", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Ecuador", "stripes": ["#FFD100", "#003893", "#ED1C24"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Ukraine", "stripes": ["#005BBB", "#FFD500"], "dir": "h"}], "bot": [{"name": "Saudi Arabia", "stripes": ["#006C35", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Iran", "stripes": ["#239F40", "#FFFFFF", "#DA0000"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Canada", "stripes": ["#FF0000", "#FFFFFF", "#FF0000"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Serbia", "stripes": ["#C6363C", "#0C4076", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Poland", "stripes": ["#FFFFFF", "#DC143C"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Tunisia", "stripes": ["#E70013", "#FFFFFF", "#E70013"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Cameroon", "stripes": ["#007A5E", "#CE1126", "#FCD116"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Ghana", "stripes": ["#006B3F", "#FCD116", "#EF3340", "#000000"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Costa Rica", "stripes": ["#002B7F", "#FFFFFF", "#CF142B", "#FFFFFF", "#002B7F"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Peru", "stripes": ["#D91023", "#FFFFFF", "#D91023"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Ivory Coast", "stripes": ["#F77F00", "#FFFFFF", "#009A44"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Egypt", "stripes": ["#CE1126", "#FFFFFF", "#000000"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Algeria", "stripes": ["#006233", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Mali", "stripes": ["#14B53A", "#FCD116", "#CE1126"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "Czechia", "stripes": ["#D7141A", "#FFFFFF", "#11457E"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Turkey", "stripes": ["#E30A17", "#FFFFFF", "#E30A17"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Scotland", "stripes": ["#003F87", "#FFFFFF", "#003F87"], "dir": "cross", "cross": "#FFFFFF"}, {"name": "Venezuela", "stripes": ["#CF142B", "#FFD100", "#00247D"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Bolivia", "stripes": ["#D52B1E", "#F9E300", "#007A3D"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Paraguay", "stripes": ["#D52B1E", "#FFFFFF", "#0038A8"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Jamaica", "stripes": ["#000000", "#FED100", "#009B3A"], "dir": "cross", "cross": "#FED100"}, {"name": "Qatar", "stripes": ["#8D1B3D", "#FFFFFF"], "dir": "v"}, {"name": "New Zealand", "stripes": ["#00247D", "#CC142B", "#00247D"], "dir": "h"}, {"name": "Uzbekistan", "stripes": ["#1EB53A", "#FFFFFF", "#CE1126"], "dir": "h"}]};

const BONUS=20, BUY_IN=50;
let avTop = TEAMS_DATA.top.map((_,i)=>i);
let avBot = TEAMS_DATA.bot.map((_,i)=>i);
let picks=[], spinning=false, angle=-Math.PI/2, currentSpin=0, pendingTop=null;

(function(){
  const pc=document.getElementById('particles');
  for(let i=0;i<18;i++){
    const p=document.createElement('div'); p.className='particle';
    const size=Math.random()*3+1;
    const hue=Math.random()>.6?'rgba(242,201,76,':'rgba(26,122,58,';
    p.style.cssText=`width:${size}px;height:${size}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;background:${hue}${Math.random()*.5+.2});animation-duration:${Math.random()*15+10}s;animation-delay:-${Math.random()*15}s`;
    pc.appendChild(p);
  }
})();

const canvas=document.getElementById('wheel');
const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
const CX=canvas.width/2, CY=canvas.height/2, R=CX-16;

// Draw flag stripes clipped to a pie slice
function drawFlagSlice(team, startAngle, endAngle) {
  const mid = (startAngle + endAngle) / 2;
  const stripes = team.stripes;
  const dir = team.dir;

  ctx.save();

  // Clip to this slice
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(CX, CY);
  ctx.arc(CX, CY, R, startAngle, endAngle);
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.clip();

  if (dir === 'h') {
    // Horizontal stripes — fill the whole wheel bounding box, clipped to slice
    const n = stripes.length;
    const h = R * 2 / n;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      ctx.fillStyle = stripes[i];
      ctx.fillRect(CX - R, CY - R + i * h, R * 2, h);
    }
  } else if (dir === 'v') {
    // Vertical stripes
    const n = stripes.length;
    const w = R * 2 / n;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      ctx.fillStyle = stripes[i];
      ctx.fillRect(CX - R + i * w, CY - R, w, R * 2);
    }
  } else if (dir === 'cross') {
    // Cross / St George / Nordic cross style
    ctx.fillStyle = stripes[0]; // background
    ctx.fillRect(CX - R, CY - R, R * 2, R * 2);
    const thick = R * 0.28;
    ctx.fillStyle = team.cross;
    // Horizontal bar
    ctx.fillRect(CX - R, CY - thick/2, R * 2, thick);
    // Vertical bar
    ctx.fillRect(CX - thick/2, CY - R, thick, R * 2);
  }

  ctx.restore();

  // Slice border
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(CX, CY);
  ctx.arc(CX, CY, R, startAngle, endAngle);
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
  ctx.stroke();
}

function drawWheel(rot) {
  const indices = currentSpin === 0 ? avTop : avBot;
  const allTeams = currentSpin === 0 ? TEAMS_DATA.top : TEAMS_DATA.bot;
  const n = indices.length;
  if (!n) return;
  const slice = (Math.PI * 2) / n;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

  // Outer glow
  const glow = ctx.createRadialGradient(CX,CY,R-6,CX,CY,R+10);
  glow.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(242,201,76,0.4)');
  glow.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(CX,CY,R+10,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=glow; ctx.fill();

  // Draw flag slices
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    const start = rot + i * slice;
    const end = start + slice;
    const team = allTeams[indices[i]];
    drawFlagSlice(team, start, end);
  }

  // Country name labels
  ctx.save();
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    const start = rot + i * slice;
    const mid = start + slice / 2;
    const team = allTeams[indices[i]];
    const labelR = R * 0.68;
    const lx = CX + Math.cos(mid) * labelR;
    const ly = CY + Math.sin(mid) * labelR;
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(lx, ly);
    ctx.rotate(mid + Math.PI / 2);
    // Shadow for readability
    ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.9)';
    ctx.shadowBlur = 4;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    const fs = n > 16 ? 8 : 10;
    ctx.font = `bold ${fs}px Rajdhani, sans-serif`;
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    const label = team.name.length > 10 ? team.name.slice(0,9) + '…' : team.name;
    ctx.fillText(label, 0, 0);
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    ctx.restore();
  }
  ctx.restore();

  // Outer ring
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(CX,CY,R,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(242,201,76,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=3; ctx.stroke();

  // Center medallion
  const cg = ctx.createRadialGradient(CX,CY,0,CX,CY,30);
  cg.addColorStop(0,'#FFE566'); cg.addColorStop(1,'#A67C00');
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(CX,CY,30,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=cg; ctx.fill();
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.stroke();
  ctx.fillStyle='#020B18';
  ctx.font='bold 8px Oswald,sans-serif';
  ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='middle';
  ctx.fillText(currentSpin===0?'TOP':'BOT', CX, CY-4);
  ctx.fillText('24', CX, CY+5);
}

drawWheel(angle);

function spin() {
  if (spinning) return;
  const indices = currentSpin===0 ? avTop : avBot;
  if (!indices.length) return;
  spinning = true;
  document.getElementById('spinBtn').disabled = true;

  const fullSpins = (Math.floor(Math.random()*5)+5) * Math.PI*2;
  const extra = Math.random() * Math.PI*2;
  const target = angle + fullSpins + extra;
  const duration = 4000 + Math.random()*1500;
  const start = performance.now(), startAngle = angle;

  function ease(t) { return t<.5 ? 4*t*t*t : 1-Math.pow(-2*t+2,3)/2; }

  function frame(now) {
    const elapsed = now - start;
    const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
    angle = startAngle + (target - startAngle) * ease(progress);
    drawWheel(angle);
    if (progress < 1) { requestAnimationFrame(frame); return; }

    const idxs = currentSpin===0 ? avTop : avBot;
    const allT = currentSpin===0 ? TEAMS_DATA.top : TEAMS_DATA.bot;
    const n = idxs.length;
    const slice = (Math.PI*2)/n;
    const norm = (((-angle % (Math.PI*2)) + Math.PI*2 + Math.PI/2) % (Math.PI*2));
    const sliceIdx = Math.floor(norm / slice) % n;
    const teamIdx = idxs[sliceIdx];
    const picked = allT[teamIdx];

    spinning = false;
    document.getElementById('spinBtn').disabled = false;

    if (currentSpin === 0) {
      pendingTop = teamIdx;
      avTop.splice(avTop.indexOf(teamIdx), 1);
      currentSpin = 1; angle = -Math.PI/2; drawWheel(angle);
      document.getElementById('spinLabel').textContent = 'Now spinning for Bottom 24 underdog';
      document.getElementById('resultBox').innerHTML = `<div><div class="result-name">${picked.name}</div><div class="result-team">Top 24 — spin for underdog</div></div>`;
      showToast('Top: ' + picked.name + ' — now spin for underdog!');
    } else {
      avBot.splice(avBot.indexOf(teamIdx), 1);
      const topTeam = TEAMS_DATA.top[pendingTop];
      picks.push({name:'Player '+(picks.length+1), topIdx:pendingTop, botIdx:teamIdx, wins:0});
      currentSpin = 0; angle = -Math.PI/2; drawWheel(angle);
      document.getElementById('spinLabel').textContent = 'Spinning for Top 24 team';
      document.getElementById('resultBox').innerHTML = `<div><div class="result-name">Player ${picks.length}</div><div class="result-team">${topTeam.name} + ${picked.name}</div></div>`;
      showToast('Assigned: ' + topTeam.name + ' & ' + picked.name);
      pendingTop = null; updateUI();
      if (!avTop.length) { document.getElementById('spinBtn').disabled=true; showToast('Draft complete!'); }
    }
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}

function updateUI() {
  const earned = picks.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.wins*BONUS,0);
  document.getElementById('potDisplay').textContent = '$'+(picks.length*BUY_IN-earned).toLocaleString();

  const grid=document.getElementById('picksGrid'), empty=document.getElementById('picksEmpty');
  if (!picks.length) { grid.innerHTML=''; empty.style.display='block'; }
  else {
    empty.style.display='none';
    grid.innerHTML = picks.map((p,i)=>{
      const t=TEAMS_DATA.top[p.topIdx], b=TEAMS_DATA.bot[p.botIdx];
      return `<div class="pick-card"><div class="pick-num">${i+1}</div><div class="pick-info"><div class="pick-name">${p.name}</div><div class="pick-teams"><span class="team-tag team-top">★ ${t.name}</span><span class="team-tag team-bot">▲ ${b.name}</span></div></div></div>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  const tg=document.getElementById('trackerGrid'), te=document.getElementById('trackerEmpty');
  if (!picks.length) { tg.innerHTML=''; te.style.display='block'; }
  else {
    te.style.display='none';
    tg.innerHTML = picks.map((p,i)=>{
      const b=TEAMS_DATA.bot[p.botIdx];
      return `<div class="tracker-card"><div class="tc-top"><div class="tc-name">${p.name}</div><div><div class="tc-earned-amt">$${p.wins*BONUS}</div><div class="tc-earned-lbl">earned</div></div></div><div class="tc-teams">▲ ${b.name} underdog wins</div><div class="tc-wins"><div class="wins-lbl">Knockout wins</div><div class="wins-ctrl"><button class="win-btn" onclick="chW(${i},-1)">−</button><div class="wins-count">${p.wins}</div><button class="win-btn" onclick="chW(${i},1)">+</button></div></div></div>`;
    }).join('');
  }
}

function chW(idx,d){
  const p=picks[idx]; const nv=Math.max(0,p.wins+d);
  if(nv===p.wins)return; p.wins=nv; updateUI();
  if(d>0) showToast('+$'+BONUS+' for '+p.name+'! Total: $'+(p.wins*BONUS));
}

function switchTab(tab){
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach((t,i)=>t.classList.toggle('active',['wheel','results','tracker','rules'][i]===tab));
  document.querySelectorAll('.section').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('section-'+tab).classList.add('active');
}

function confirmReset(){
  if(!picks.length&&pendingTop===null)return;
  if(!confirm('Reset the entire draft? This cannot be undone.'))return;
  avTop=TEAMS_DATA.top.map((_,i)=>i);
  avBot=TEAMS_DATA.bot.map((_,i)=>i);
  picks=[]; pendingTop=null; currentSpin=0;
  angle=-Math.PI/2; drawWheel(angle);
  document.getElementById('spinBtn').disabled=false;
  document.getElementById('spinLabel').textContent='Spinning for Top 24 team';
  document.getElementById('resultBox').innerHTML='<div class="result-waiting">Spin to assign a team</div>';
  updateUI(); showToast('Draft has been reset');
}

let toastTimer;
function showToast(msg){
  const t=document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent=msg; t.classList.add('show');
  clearTimeout(toastTimer);
  toastTimer=setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),3200);
}

updateUI();
</script>
</body>
</html>
